patterns.name: WORK_LOG Gate Failure
patterns.root_cause: The pipeline attempted to submit without properly declaring intent in WORK_LOG.md as required by Trinity Protocol.

patterns.name: Missing Module
patterns.root_cause: A required Python module is missing from PYTHONPATH or not installed.
playbook: pip install {0} || echo 'Ensure local package {0} is in PYTHONPATH'

patterns.name: API Authentication Failure
patterns.regex: (401 Unauthorized|Invalid token|HF_TOKEN not found|Kaggle API key missing)
patterns.root_cause: Missing or expired tokens for Kaggle or Hugging Face.

patterns.name: Kaggle Conflict (Slug Taken)
patterns.root_cause: Kaggle submission slug is already taken.
